notes: Sentence-final 'deh' marks a self-decision arrived at after consideration — 'I'll eat first, then [moving on]' rather than 'I'll just eat first' (which would be 'aja' not 'deh'). English ', then' captures the sequencing-and-acceptance register. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: 'I guess I'll eat first' or 'I'll eat first I think' might capture the deliberative quality better.
